title: lahaya minuartoides
intro: Lahaya minuartoides, also known as Mountain Tea or Mountain Mint, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Philippines. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Lahaya minuartoides include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
